outreach.linkedin_invite: Hi Megan, noticed VaultEdge runs DataStax for payment processing. ScyllaDB handles similar workloads at a fraction of the cost with better p99 latency. Worth a 15-min chat?
outreach.follow_up_email_subject: Faster payments at lower cost — ScyllaDB for VaultEdge
outreach.follow_up_email_body:
Hi Megan,

I reached out a few weeks ago about ScyllaDB as a DataStax alternative for VaultEdge Payments.

Given the real-time latency demands in payments, I wanted to share that teams migrating from DataStax to ScyllaDB typically see 40-60% cost reduction alongside better p99 tail latency — no JVM tuning required.

Happy to walk through a quick architecture comparison specific to your stack.

Best,
Yotam Oppenheimer
Solutions Engineer @ ScyllaDB
